case_title: HARLEY MILNE VS. VANESSA L PINTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,727.50 FILED BY MILNE, HARLEY AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, VANESSA L A.K.A. FLOZIENTERPRIZES INC. LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MILNE, HARLEY

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILNE, HARLEY AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, VANESSA L A.K.A. FLOZIENTERPRIZES INC. LLC
DECLARATION OF OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILNE, HARLEY
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-11-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-17-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED DEC-06-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, VANESSA L A.K.A. FLOZIENTERPRIZES INC. LLC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MARK MURRAY FILED BY MILNE, HARLEY PINTO, VANESSA L A.K.A. FLOZIENTERPRIZES INC. LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK MURRAY. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PINTO, VANESSA L A.K.A. FLOZIENTERPRIZES INC. LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILNE, HARLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PINTO, VANESSA L A.K.A. FLOZIENTERPRIZES INC. LLC DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. CONTRACT AMOUNT WAS $1500. DEFENDANT PAID $500. PLAINTIFF WITHELD I.P. MATERIALS & MANIPOLATED & PREVENTED DEFENDANT FROM USING WEBSITE, GENERATING TO DEFENDANT COST & EXPENSES EXCEEDING $1000 WHICH DEFENDANT IS CREDITED AS AN OFFSET. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
